close_reason: Implemented brownfield adoption E2E test (05-brownfield-adoption.sh). Tests adopting existing Go project with turnkey.
description:
Test scenario: Adding turnkey to existing language project

1. Create NixOS container
2. Create a standard Go/Python/Rust project with existing deps (go.mod, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml)
3. Add turnkey flake.nix boilerplate (import turnkey module)
4. Add .envrc with 'use flake'
5. Enter devshell - verify deps files auto-generated
6. Verify 'tk build' works without modifying source code
7. Verify language-native tools still work (go build, cargo build, pytest)

Validates: brownfield adoption, no disruption to existing workflows
title: E2E: Adopt existing project (brownfield)
